# Mucho Mas Que Idiomas

> Language academy in Madrid, Spain, teaching 10 languages through cultural immersion.

## About

Mucho Mas Que Idiomas is a language academy located in central Madrid that teaches 10 languages using a unique cultural immersion method. Instead of traditional grammar-first teaching, classes integrate cinema, gastronomy, literature, music, and cultural outings as the primary teaching tools. Small groups of maximum 8 students ensure personalized attention. The academy has over 10 years of experience, 500+ students trained, and a 5.0 rating on Google.

## Languages Offered

- English (Cambridge, IELTS preparation)
- Spanish (DELE preparation, immersion for foreigners)
- French (DELF, DALF preparation)
- German (Goethe-Zertifikat, TestDaF preparation)
- Italian (CILS, CELI, PLIDA preparation)
- Japanese (JLPT preparation)
- Korean (TOPIK preparation)
- Mandarin Chinese (HSK preparation)
- Arabic (classical and modern standard)
- Portuguese (CAPLE preparation)

## Programs

- Intensive Beginner (A1-A2): 4 classes per week, designed for those starting from zero
- Intermediate Cultural (B1-B2): 5 classes per week, the most popular program combining grammar advancement with deep cultural immersion
- Advanced & Fluency (C1-C2): Personalized sessions focused on achieving native-level fluency

## Method

The academy's methodology centers on cultural immersion: students learn through real conversation from day one, cinema screenings and debates, museum visits and cultural outings around Madrid, gastronomy workshops, literature clubs, and music analysis. Grammar is taught in context rather than in isolation.

## Pages

- [Home](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/): Overview of the academy, all languages, methodology, programs, team, and contact
- [English Classes](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/clases-de-ingles-madrid.html): English program details, cultural activities, Cambridge/IELTS preparation, FAQ
- [Spanish Classes](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/clases-de-espanol-madrid.html): Spanish for foreigners, DELE preparation, Madrid immersion program
- [French Classes](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/clases-de-frances-madrid.html): French program, DELF/DALF preparation, cinema and philosophy activities
- [German Classes](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/clases-de-aleman-madrid.html): German program, Goethe/TestDaF preparation, career-focused learning
- [Italian Classes](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/clases-de-italiano-madrid.html): Italian program, gastronomy workshops, cinema and art activities
- [Japanese Classes](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/clases-de-japones-madrid.html): Japanese program, JLPT preparation, anime, calligraphy, and cultural activities
- [Korean Classes](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/clases-de-coreano-madrid.html): Korean program, TOPIK preparation, K-drama and K-pop cultural activities
- [Chinese Classes](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/clases-de-chino-madrid.html): Mandarin Chinese program, HSK preparation, calligraphy and tea ceremony
- [Arabic Classes](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/clases-de-arabe-madrid.html): Arabic program, calligraphy, poetry, and Al-Andalus heritage activities
- [Portuguese Classes](https://muchomasqueidiomas.es/clases-de-portugues-madrid.html): Portuguese program, CAPLE preparation, fado nights and lusophone culture

- Free trial class available with no commitment
